items.name: sentinelai
items.description: Security scanner, cost tracker, and model router for the AI ecosystem. Scan Claude Code skills, MCP servers, and LLM plugins   for vulnerabilities. Track and forecast LLM API spend across providers. Get intelligent model recommendations based on task   type, cost, and latency. CLI-first, open source.

items.description: Open-source CLI scanner for agentic AI components — skills, MCP servers, system prompts
